name: Bloodthorn
description: A reviled blade that bites deeper with each wriggle of its victim's final throes.

abilities.name: Soul Rend
abilities.description: Silences a target enemy for a while. At the end of the duration, a portion of all damage they took during the silence is dealt to them again, as magical damage. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 150. Cast Range: 900. Accumulated Damage: 60%. Duration: 5. Bonus Magical Damage: 50. The caster's units gain full accuracy against the target. Additionally, whenever the target gets attacked by any unit, they take additional magical damage.

abilities.name: Pierce
abilities.description: Grants the wielder's attack a chance to pierce through evasion and deal bonus magical damage. Proc Chance: 40%. Bonus Magical Damage: 60.
